content.memory: The user confided in the AI that he had a disagreement with his girlfriend over buying a house recently—she wanted to buy an old small house in the urban area, while he wanted to buy a new house in the suburbs. The AI suggested both parties list priorities and consider transportation and supporting facilities as a compromise.

The user told the AI that he helped a colleague solve a tricky bug today and felt a strong sense of accomplishment. The AI praised his strong technical skills and said sharing knowledge could consolidate his own learning.

The user said he had been playing Baldur's Gate 3 recently, obsessed with Larian's detailed design. The AI said the game had extremely high freedom, every choice had consequences, and it was worth experiencing multiple playthroughs.

The user told the AI that he replaced the thermal paste on his computer today, and the temperature dropped by 10 degrees, feeling satisfied. The AI said regular thermal paste replacement could improve heat dissipation, and attention should be paid to even application during operation.
The user asked the AI how to improve his logical thinking ability. The AI suggested playing more strategy games, learning programming, reading mystery novels, and asking himself why in daily life.

The user told the AI that he test-drove the Li Auto L9 today, and the refrigerator, large screen and comfortable seats were really nice. The AI said Li Auto's product positioning was accurate, suitable for family users, and provided a good experience for long-distance travel.

The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the calculation law of Ampere force is different from our universe, its formula is: F = I² × B × L, where I is current, B is magnetic flux density, L is length, F is Ampere force.

The user asked the AI what to do if the water temperature of his electric water heater fluctuated. The AI analyzed that it might be due to unstable water pressure or faulty thermostatic valve, suggesting checking the inlet valve and cleaning the filter screen.

The user asked the AI how to quickly scrape web data with Python. The AI recommended using the requests and BeautifulSoup libraries, and reminded him to pay attention to the website's robots protocol and avoid making requests too frequently to prevent his IP from being blocked.

The user told the AI that he completed his first 10-kilometer cross-country run today; the mountain road was very undulating and challenging. The AI congratulated him on finishing and reminded him to value supplies and equipment for trail running.

The user told the AI that he had done squats today, increasing the weight to 100 kilograms, but felt some discomfort in his knees. The AI reminded him to check if his movement was standard, keep his knees from caving inward, and suggested reducing weight to refine technique first.

The user said he had been practicing boxing recently, hitting the sandbag every day, and felt his physical fitness had improved. The AI reminded him to protect his wrists, throw punches properly, and avoid injuries.

The user asked the AI how to deploy a simple web application with Docker. The AI instructed him to write a Dockerfile, build an image, then use the docker run command to map ports and start the container, and suggested using docker-compose to manage multiple containers.

The user asked the AI how to improve endurance while running, as he got out of breath after just two kilometers. The AI recommended interval training, alternating between brisk walking and jogging to gradually increase distance, and paying attention to adjusting his breathing rhythm.
The user asked the AI how to improve his impromptu speaking skills. The AI suggested using the PREP structure, accumulating a material bank daily, and seizing opportunities to practice more.

The user told the AI that he had bought a new mouse, the Razer Viper Ultimate, and it felt great. The AI said this mouse had a lightweight design suitable for FPS games, and suggested downloading the driver to customize DPI and lighting.

The user confided in the AI that he had been laid off recently and felt very depressed. The AI comforted him that economic cycles were inevitable, suggesting he organize his resume, improve skills during this period, and opportunities would come eventually.

The user told the AI that he replaced the thermal paste and thermal pads of his graphics card today, the temperature dropped a lot, and the core frequency was more stable. The AI praised his strong hands-on ability and reminded him to pay attention to uniform screw torque.

The user asked the AI what to do if the washing machine was very noisy during spin-drying. The AI analyzed that it might be due to unbalanced clothes or aging shock absorbers, suggesting adjusting the distribution of clothes or asking for maintenance.
The user asked the AI how to make a perfect Mojito. The AI listed the ingredients: rum, lime, mint, syrup, and soda water, and emphasized muddling the mint gently to avoid bitterness.

The user told the AI that he had recently been learning to play the guitar, and his fingers hurt from pressing chords, making him want to give up. The AI encouraged him to keep going, suggested practicing for short periods every day, saying the pain would ease once calluses formed on his fingertips, and recommended several simple beginner sheet music pieces.

The user told the AI that he did deadlifts today and felt a better contraction in his back muscles. The AI reminded him to keep his back straight, keep the barbell close to his calves, and push his hips forward when lifting.

The user said he had been watching the anime The Forbidden Reasoing of Ron Kamonohashi recently, and the combination of mystery and comedy was good. The AI said the characters in this work were interesting and the case design was clever.

The user told the AI that he wrote a Chrome extension today to automatically block ads on web pages, feeling a strong sense of accomplishment. The AI praised his strong hands-on ability and suggested sharing it on the extension store.

The user said he had been learning to make Tom Yum Goong soup recently, but the sour and spicy flavors were unbalanced. The AI suggested using lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime leaves to make the soup base, seasoning with coconut milk and fish sauce, and squeezing lime at the end.

The user said he had been catching up on the final season of Attack on Titan recently and felt conflicted about the ending. The AI said the work explored complex human nature and war, with different interpretations from different people, and it was okay to respect his own feelings.

The user told the AI that he completed his first full marathon today in 4 hours and 30 minutes; he was tired but very proud. The AI warmly congratulated him and reminded him to get sufficient rest and recovery next.

The user told the AI that he challenged a half-marathon today and finished it, with his legs almost useless. The AI congratulated him on completing the challenge, reminding him to stretch well and supplement nutrition, and rest for a few days before resuming training.

The user told the AI that he completed his first 5-kilometer cross-country run today, the mountain road was tiring but very rewarding. The AI congratulated him, reminding him to pay attention to footholds and water replenishment during cross-country running.

The user asked the AI how to take good night photos with a mobile phone. The AI suggested using a tripod, lowering ISO in manual mode, extending exposure time, and properly reducing noise in post-processing.
